feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Could you please tell me how to register an order slip and how to process it afterwards when direct
entry.content:
Could you please tell me how to register an order slip and how to process it afterwards when direct shipping to the supplier is done at the time of ordering, rather than starting from an order receipt?
I understand that BDK and BD3 Scope Items are applicable when ordering.
I would be grateful if you could provide me with Scope Items and materials that describe direct shipping to the supplier when ordering.

entry.title: Cost Center mass changes / custom field mass changes in Public cloud
entry.content:
Business wants to make Mass changes to certain fields in cost center master data.
Currently, the only way possible that we are aware is to manually open each cost center and change the required fields. 
This is very time consuming and inefficient if there are hundreds and thousands of cost centers.
 
For example, there is a custom field: Finance Prime
Business wants to change the names of the Finance primes (mass changes to several cost centers)
Or if this can be achieved via BTP?

entry.title: Joule Setup / Error during Booster Execution
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
we have tried to integrate Joule with our TDD System using the End-to-End Setup Guide (Joule – End-to-End Setup Guide (for all Line of Bu... - SAP Community). For context the joule entitlement is in one subaccount and the workzone entitlements are in a different subaccount but under the same global account. Everything else was setup identical to the guide.

During the execution of the booster we encountered the following error:


or as text:
[SaaS Subscription/(module.joule_subscription.cis_saas_subscription.saas_subscription[0])] The subscription of subaccount (name of subaccount) to application das-application and plan foundation, failed with state: SUBSCRIBE_FAILED. - Error Message: 'Async callback of reuse service  'Document Grounding'  with appName document-grounding failed. It failed its asynchronous callback and responded with message: Service Document Grounding with appName document-grounding did not send its async callback response within the maximum allowed timeout of 300000 milliseconds. To resolve the issue, please contact this service's owner. (Root Application : Joule appName: das-application-ias. Please open support case using the component: CA-JOULE.)'. App Error: ''. 

Can anyone point us to what the issue might be and how to resolve it ?

Best regards 
Lukas

entry.title: After 'delivery completed' is set we can still post a Goods receipt
entry.content:
After posting a goods receipt for a partial Qty against a purchase order item and setting a delivery complete flag 
in the PO item. We find it is still possible to post a goods receipt even if the delivery complete flag is set in the PO item ? 

 

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to get latest records from I_GOODSMOVEMENTCUBE CDS View based on Posting Date
entry.content:
Dear community,

We need a report of material aging, for that we need some material documents with latest posting dates for each material, Can I know how to do this in Custom CDS View?

how to sort in descending order and take top 1 in custom cds view app?

entry.title: Mass deletion of alternative Units of Measure
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am trying to mass delete Alternative Units of Measure from the product master data in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud using the "Manage Mass Maintenance" app. I have included "D", in the "_ACTION_CODE" field in my upload file, and made sure I wasn't deleting the base unit of measure, but I received the following error:

"Deletion not allowed for 'Dimensions' (MARM) or one of its children."

 Is there any workaround to delete an Alternative UOM in mass? 

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks!

entry.title: Mass creation & upload freight agreements b SAP Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

For a project with transportation management I'm looking for a way to upload freight agreements including rate tebles into SAP Public cloud.

I've looked into the migration cockpit, but there is no object at the moment.

I couldn't find an app either.

How can we achieve this?  There are too many records to manually enter them in the system.

Also for the future, they will require mass maintenance functionality.

thx.

Kind rgrds,

Bart

entry.title: Post Adjustment to GR/IR G/L account
entry.content:
How to post Currency Adjustment to a GR/IR Account?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Email Template - TotalGrossAmount value NOT in available variables
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to create a email template to be used when a billing document is sent by email to our customer.

This template has a bunch of variables that can be used in the template like the date of the billing document, etc.

Among those fields you can find {{TotalNetAmount}} and {{TotalTaxAmount}}, but the TotalGrossAmount is not available as a variable while this field is one of hte most important of a billing document as it is the amount to be paid...

Does someone knows how it can be added ?

Thank you very much for your help 🙂

entry.title: Mass upload basic data text
entry.content:
Hi!

Does anyone know how can I mass upload basic text in the notes tab? I tried using MARA_STXL - Basic Data. Text but it can only update notes that is already in but not add new ones.

entry.title: 在进行物料成本估算时，是否能只按天或者日期进行选择物料，只估算没有进行成本估算的物料，如何处理？
entry.content: #SAP S4HANA Cloud #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition 财务#在进行物料成本估算时，是否能只按天或者日期进行选择物料，只估算没有进行成本估算的物料，如何处理？因为物料太多，需每天进行物料成本的估算，能否只跑未进行成本估算的物料，而不所有物料都重新进行成本估算，如何处理？感谢

entry.title: Unable to activate the Goods Receipt Confirmations Communication Scenario in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: We are trying to access the Goods Receipt Confirmations Standard API from the SAP Business Accelerator Hub for S/4HANA Public Cloud. However, the required Communication Scenario (SAP_COM_0782) is not available for activation in the public cloud.

entry.title: Unable to Find Migration Template for Bulk Upload of PR's in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
We need to bulk upload Purchase Requisitions (PRs) from our legacy system into SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. However, after reviewing the available Migration Cockpit templates, we could not find a suitable standard template for mass uploading PRs.

 

Could you please confirm:

Is there a standard migration template available for mass upload of PR data?

If not, what alternative approach should we use to perform the bulk upload (e.g., APIs, Fiori apps, Mass Processing tools, or Custom Development)?

Any SAP Best Practices or documentation related to this process?

 

 

Expected Outcome:

 

Guidance on whether a standard migration template exists for PR mass upload.

Recommendations for an alternative method (e.g., APIs, integration tools, or Workarounds).

Any SAP documentation or implementation guide that can help us proceed.

 

 

Please assist us in resolving this issue. Thank you.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Public Cloud and Sales&Service Cloud V2 - Difference between Main Filters and Segment Filters
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

we have integrated SAP Public Cloud with SAP Sales & Services Cloud V2.

Now we ask ourselves what is the difference in data replication between Main Filters and Segment Filters? 

Thanks in advance!

Katharina

entry.title: Mass change of Master Recipe usage in SAP Public Cloud is it possible?
entry.content: Hi, can someone help me, i need to do a mass change to master recipe, what are my options, since the manage master recipe app doesn't allow mass changes?

entry.title: How can i mass change the valuation category of a material? in sap public cloud
entry.content:
I checked and there's no stock, there's no purchase orders, or process orders, and it doens't allow me to change,

 

Can someone help me try to unterstand?

entry.title: unable to enter net price value 9,615,000.00
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

We have a requirement for Import PO we need decimal places upto 4 in ouput PO form so is the reason our technical team have written the logic with length 10 with dec places 4. 

How can we achieve this 4 decimal places in output form?

Regards

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: There is an API for calling GETPDF for a billing Document but it only fetches latest PDF
entry.content:
Hi all, 

There is an API for calling GETPDF for a billing Document but it only fetches latest PDF whose status has been completed. Is there any way or Filter to fetch the Desired Template by filtering it in S4hana Public cloud.

/sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV/GetPDF  

API fo that

entry.title: Purchase Account Management Activation in Public cloud
entry.content:
Client is having a requirement to activate Purchase Account Management for reporting purposes but we are not able to find the option to  activate it.

 The BC Activity is available in ECC under MM as Purchase Account Management.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Disable App Finder in S4HC
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

 

Our requirement is to disable app finder in S4HC Fiori page.

Thanks & Regards.
